## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Biologica's ad challenges and the future of the Biologica-GrowthX partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Unsustainable Meta CPMs** are stalling Biologica's growth, making their current ad strategy unprofitable.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [**Biologica cannot renew** the contract at its current price, citing a costly 6-month "co-development" phase where they built key workflows (e.g., a regulatory review prompt) that GrowthX then integrated.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [**GrowthX is firm on price** (current rate is their minimum) but is open to creative structures, such as performance-based milestones tied to organic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
  - [**The path forward** is a new organic growth strategy to build long-term authority and reduce ad dependency.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)

## Topics

### Biologica's Ad Performance Crisis

  - [**Problem:** Unsustainably high CPMs on Meta are making Biologica's ad spend unprofitable.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [**Impact:** This stalls growth and forces a pivot to other channels (e.g., Google Ads), which are slower to scale.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Biologica is meeting with a Meta rep to diagnose the issue, believing it's either an internal fix or a platform-level anomaly.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)

### Partnership Challenges & Renewal

  - [**Biologica's Stance:** Cannot renew the contract at its current price.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [**Justification:** The first 6 months were a costly "co-development" phase.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Biologica built key workflows (e.g., a regulatory review prompt) that GrowthX then integrated.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
      - [This process was expensive in both cost and team cycles.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Stance:** Cannot lower the price.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The current rate is their minimum ($15k/mo). A downsell would hurt key business metrics (ACV, margins) and force them to turn down higher-paying clients.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
  - [**Mutual Interest:** Both parties want to continue the partnership, recognizing Biologica's value as a "lighthouse" client in the wellness/healthcare vertical.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)

### Proposed Solution: Organic Growth Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Build long-term organic authority to reduce ad dependency.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [**Method:** A foundational SEO strategy focused on:](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
      - [**Content:** High-quality, medical-grade content to build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
      - [**Backlinks:** A deliberate strategy to earn links, as a new domain (100 backlinks) faces an uphill battle in the health space.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [**Incentive Structure:** GrowthX proposed performance-based milestones tied to organic growth metrics (e.g., AI visibility, site traffic) to align incentives.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:** Deliver a proposal for a new organic growth strategy, including a creative incentive structure (e.g., performance milestones) at the current minimum price.](https://fathom.video/share/ajyjTMZxugJhZSSDW5rpmpxti69VfSja?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
